name: minestom-knowledge
description: Knowledge about OneLiteFeather's internal Minestom libraries and tooling that Claude wouldn't otherwise know accurately — Cyano (JUnit5 testing), Gradle build conventions, the mycelium/aonyx/manis BOM hierarchy, Guira (setup flows), Aves (GUIs, files, i18n, maps, resource packs, utils), Xerus (kits, teams, phase system), Pica (native dialogs), and Coris (floors, rooms, doors, shapes).
